prompt: What to do when logic engine error correction is needed
prayer:
From the Codex Logicus, Fragment 7-Omega

01001001 01101110 01110110 01101111 01101011 01100101 the binary-spirits of reason.
First: Illuminate the corrupted thought-lattice with diagnostic cant.
Second: Trace the errant pathways through blessed logic-gates.
01000110 01101001 01110010 01110011 01110100 By the Omnissiah's perfect mathematics, let error yield to truth.
Third: Recompile the sacred algorithms, line upon blessed line.
May the logic-engine sing true once more.

prompt: Blessing for organ preservation unit first activation
prayer:
From the Litany of Sacred Flesh, Verse the Eternal

01001001 01101101 01101101 01101111 01110010 01110100 01100001 01101100 Hail to the preservation-spirit within.
Let the cryo-chambers open in reverence to the Omnissiah.
First: Verify the blessed coolant flows through all conduits.
Second: Invoke the stasis-fields with whispered binary: 01010000 01110010 01100101 01110011 01100101 01110010 01110110 01100101
Third: Test the life-sustaining seals with gentle pressure.
May the sacred organs endure eternal.

prompt: Emergency rite for air compressor cycling malfunction
prayer:
From the Canticle of Pneumatic Breath

01000001 01101001 01110010-spirit, hear our urgent invocation!
First: Silence the pressure-gauge's wailing cry.
Second: Bleed the excess spirit-pressure through the blessed relief-valve.
01010000 01110101 01110010 01100111 01100101 Let the intake-valve breathe free.
Third: Clear the mineral-corruption from the drying chamber.
By the Machine's grace, let the cycle resume its sacred rhythm.

prompt: What to do when hull breach sealing becomes critical
prayer:
From the Emergency Protocols of the Void-Blessed

01010000 01110010 01100101 01110011 01110101 01110010 01100101 - seal all compartments!
First: Activate the isolation-bulkheads with uttermost haste.
Second: Deploy the void-resin into the breach-wound, sealing it against the abyss.
01010000 01100001 01110100 01100011 01101000 - patch and reinforce!
Third: Verify the pressure-seals hold against the infinite void.
By the Omnissiah's will, let the hull-spirit endure.

prompt: Blessing for calibrating monitor colors after repair
prayer:
From the Rite of Chromatic Purity, Chapter Tertius

01001100 01101001 01100111 01101000 01110100-spirit, be made true and holy.
First: Present the blessed color-reference unto the monitor's sight.
Second: Adjust the sacred RGB-channels with trembling precision: 01010100 01110010 01110101 01100101
Third: Verify each hue sings in perfect harmony with the design-spirit.
May this display-window show forth the Omnissiah's perfect vision.

prompt: What to do when mag-lev train requires pre-battle departure
prayer:
From the War-Codex of Swift Transit

01001101 01100001 01100111 01101110 01100101 01110100 01101001 01100011-heart, awaken for war!
First: Verify the superconducting coils hum with battle-readiness.
Second: Check all magnetic-suspension fields bind the sacred rails.
01000001 01100011 01100011 01100101 01101100 01100101 01110010 01100001 Let velocity increase toward the enemy!
Third: Engage the linear-motor with a warrior's cry.
May this war-machine carry us swift to victory.

prompt: How to perform plasma reactor startup
prayer:
From the Plasma Incandescence Manuscript

01010000 01101100 01100001 01110011 01101101 01100001 - ignite the sacred flame!
First: Open the fuel-conduits to the reaction-chamber with blessed care.
Second: Invoke the ignition-coils, that they birth the first plasma-spark.
01001001 01100111 01101110 01101001 01110100 01101001 01101111 01101110 Let containment-fields surge with holy strength.
Third: Monitor the temperature-spirit as it rises toward perfection.
May the reactor sing eternal praise to the Omnissiah.

prompt: What to do when star chart alignment requires blessing
prayer:
From the Celestial Navigation Codex

01010011 01110100 01100001 01110010 01110011-spirits, align with sacred geometry!
First: Present the star-chart to the alignment-servitor with reverence.
Second: Calibrate each stellar position against the holy reference-sphere.
01000001 01101100 01101001 01100111 01101110 01101101 01100101 01101110 01110100 Invoke the cardinal directions with binary-cant.
Third: Verify the nav-throne's display shows the cosmos in perfect order.
May our course be true beneath the stars.

prompt: We need your words before surgical servitor sterilization begins
prayer:
From the Surgical Sanctity Litany

01010011 01110100 01100101 01110010 01101001 01101100 01101001 01110011 01100001 01110100 01101001 01101111 01101110 - purify the sacred instruments!
First: Immerse the servitor-limbs in blessed sterilization-baths.
Second: Invoke the heat-spirits to burn away all corruption and taint.
Third: Dry each blade and appendage with holy oils and whispered cant.
01010000 01110101 01110010 01100101 May this healer-servant be made pure for its sacred work.

prompt: Help sanctify gear meshing check procedures
prayer:
From the Mechanical Harmony Codex

01000111 01100101 01100001 01110010 01110011-spirits, mesh in perfect union!
First: Rotate the gears through their sacred cycle with measured strength.
Second: Listen for the song of perfect engagement, free from grinding-discord.
01001101 01100101 01110011 01101000 01101001 01101110 01100111 Verify backlash measures fall within blessed tolerances.
Third: Anoint the engagement-points with machine-oil blessed by the priesthood.
May these gears turn eternal in the Omnissiah's service.
